summary: Joel announces that his web series 'UI Design for Programmers' is being published as a print book by Apress. The print version will include expanded content with five bonus chapters, additional illustrations, and a foreword by Dave Winer. He expresses enthusiasm for the publisher Apress, noting that its founder Gary Cornell has deep programming knowledge.
key_points: Joel's 'UI Design for Programmers' web series is being adapted into a print book with significant additional content
Joel values publishers whose leaders have genuine technical expertise, citing Apress founder Gary Cornell as a rare example
The book will feature a foreword by Dave Winer, a notable figure in the blogging and software world
money_quotes: the founder, Gary Cornell, actually knows more about programming than I do, a rare trait in a computer books publisher.
key_insight: Joel values technical credibility in publishing, preferring publishers whose leadership genuinely understands programming.
